scripts.test: node tests/battle-permissions.test.js && node tests/room-lifecycle.test.js && node tests/room-code-collision.test.js && node tests/battle-subtitle-regression.test.js && node tests/golden-replay.test.js
scripts.smoke:shared-load: node -e "const {loadSharedDefinitions}=require('./shared/loadSharedDefinitions'); const r=loadSharedDefinitions({rootDir:'./shared'}); if(!r.found||r.error) throw r.error||new Error('definitions missing'); console.log('loaded definitions', r.data.version);"
